script/deploy.sh: # Deploy helper for the demo service.
# Authenticated deploy call. The token is handed to the request builder on
# stdin, never on argv, so it can't leak into the process table.
echo "deploy: authenticated request prepared for ${url} (token not shown)"

report: [blocking-this-diff] Removed hardcoded API_TOKEN literal from script/deploy.sh:6 and replaced it with `source "$(dirname "$0")/fetch-deploy-token.sh"` to load the token from Vault; guard, deploy(), and stdin request unchanged. Re-read the edited region to confirm.
